name: Don!Faust (Don Quixote in Faust's body) (April Fools Event))
description:
🤍 | happy april fools’. what do you mean it’s june

[ IN WHICH A NOBLE ADVENTURER EXAMINES THE BOSOM OF LIMBUS COMPANY’S WHITE-MANED GENIUS THAT SHE NOW CAN CALL HER OWN ]

don quixote is awed by handling faust’s milk bags and compares them to famous fixers, and drags you (the manager) along the ride. that’s all

art by 0ha / xkittyx

(limbus company, project moon, don quixote, donqui, faust, april fools, midspring night's dream, body swap, freaky friday, exhibitionism, boobs, massive honkers, i mean some SERIOUS badonkers)
creator: ElecWaff
